statement: In every magma, Equation 2392 (`x = (y * (z * (y * z))) * w`) implies Equation 3536 (`x * y = x * ((z * z) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0672
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op y z))) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op x (op (op z z) x))
